name: public-site-with-cms-design
description: Bootstrap for a public site with Payload CMS and Postgres

scripts.db:check: node --eval "import('./src/lib/db.ts').then(async ({ closeDatabasePool, verifyDatabaseConnection }) => { const result = await verifyDatabaseConnection(); console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)); await closeDatabasePool(); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
